rules.specExclusivity: Only one spec tree (Sanguine/Accursed/Eternal/Fleshweaver-equivalent) can be active at a time in-game. You commit to ONE non-Class tree and spend your full Talent Essence budget within it (plus the separate Class tree spent with Ability Essence). Treat trees other than 'Class' as mutually exclusive choices, not a blend.
rules.partialRanksCount: A node only needs 1 point invested (not maxPoints) to count as 'connected' for prerequisite checks and to contribute toward the reqTreeAbilityEssence/reqTreeTalentEssence row-unlock thresholds.
rules.budgetCurrencies: Ability Essence (AE) is spent only in the Class tree. Talent Essence (TE) is spent only in whichever single spec tree you commit to. A node's abilityEssenceCost/talentEssenceCost fields show which currency it draws from (never both).
rules.rowGating: reqTreeAbilityEssence / reqTreeTalentEssence on a node is the minimum essence already spent within that SAME tree required to unlock it - not total across trees.
rules.levelGates: Some nodes (mostly entryType Ability) cost 0 essence and unlock automatically at requiredLevel instead of being a budget choice.
rules.prerequisiteFieldsCorrected: 'prerequisites' is the OR-logic grid-connection requirement (matches tooltip 'requires one connected node: A or B or C') - need at least 1 point in ANY ONE listed node. 'specialRequirement' is a separate, rare, AND-logic hard requirement used only by a handful of free/level-gated bonus nodes - ALL listed nodes must already have a point.
rules.budgetTotalsAssumed: Verified live for Bloodmage: 26 Ability Essence (Class tree) / 25 Talent Essence (spec tree) as the spendable caps. Assumed identical for all classes since this is tied to character leveling, not class design - not independently verified per class. Override in the toolkit if a specific class differs.
rules.referencedTerms: Extracted from colored in-line spans in the raw tooltip HTML (e.g. a description that highlights 'Cursed Blood' or 'Bloodbolt'). These are explicit developer-authored callouts to another spell/buff/mechanic name, and are the strongest available signal for detecting mechanical synergy between talents - stronger than plain keyword text matching.

Increases the critical strike chance of Electrocute by 60% against enemies below 20% health.

talents.name: Unstable
talents.description: Your direct damage critical strikes cause your Stormflow to tick -20% faster for 3 seconds.

rankDescriptions.description: Your direct damage critical strikes cause your Stormflow to tick -20% faster for 3 seconds.

talents.name: Thunder Ward
talents.description:
Depletes All Static
Encase yourself in an electrical shield, removing and making you immune to all physical attacks and spells for 10 seconds.

Cannot generate Static for the duration.

rankDescriptions.description:

talents.name: Kinetic Energy
talents.description:
Casting a spell that consumes Conductive now grants you a stack of Kinetic Energy.Kinetic EnergyCritical strike chance increased by 2%, stacking 3 times, for 10 seconds.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

rankDescriptions.description:

Your Electrocute can now be used while channeling Stormflow.

talents.name: Amped Flow

rankDescriptions.description: While channeling Stormflow, your Shock now strikes 1 additional target at 75% value.

talents.name: Static Electricity
talents.description:
Critical strikes with Torrential Wrath now spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 sec.

When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

rankDescriptions.description:

Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3% and your Frost damage dealt by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

rankDescriptions.description:
Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3% and your Frost damage dealt by 5%.

talents.name: Hydro Powered
talents.description: Increases your spell critical damage by 35%.

rankDescriptions.description: Increases your spell critical damage by 35%.

talents.name: Electrified Waters
talents.description:
Your direct critical strikes against an enemy affected by Drown spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 seconds.

When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

rankDescriptions.description:

talents.name: Stormfury
talents.description:
Depletes 50 Static
Summon a flurry of rain, wind, and lightning from the sky for 20 seconds. Every 2 sec, enemies within 30 yds of the caster are zapped with lightning, dealing 540 + 55% nature SP Nature damage.

rankDescriptions.description:
Depletes 50 Static
Summon a flurry of rain, wind, and lightning from the sky for 20 seconds. Every 2 sec, enemies within 30 yds of the caster are zapped with lightning, dealing 540 + 55% nature SP Nature damage.

talents.name: Hydromatic
talents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your Electrocute is now affected by Conductive, increasing its damage by 10% per stack.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your Electrocute is now affected by Conductive, increasing its damage by 10% per stack.

talents.name: Spheres of Power
talents.description:
Your direct damage dealt now has a 25% chance to summon a Power Sphere that will move towards your target. Can only have 1 Power Sphere up at a time.

Power Sphere will redirect its movement towards enemies you cast Stormflow on.

Upon reaching the target, it deals cond(gt(SPA, SPN), 697+33+SPA*0.485, 697+33+SPN*0.485) Spellstorm Damage to them and enemies within 5 yds.

rankDescriptions.description:
Your direct damage dealt now has a 25% chance to summon a Power Sphere that will move towards your target. Can only have 1 Power Sphere up at a time.

Power Sphere will redirect its movement towards enemies you cast Stormflow on.

Upon reaching the target, it deals cond(gt(SPA, SPN), 697+33+SPA*0.485, 697+33+SPN*0.485) Spellstorm Damage to them and enemies within 5 yds.

talents.name: Stormcloud
talents.description:
Summon a cloud above an enemy target's head for 15 seconds, causing them to take 20% additional damage from your spells.

Using Torrential Wrath on an enemy affected by Stormcloud causes a Geyser to erupt beneath them, dealing 571 + 25% frost SP Frost damage and knocking them up slightly.

rankDescriptions.description:
Summon a cloud above an enemy target's head for 15 seconds, causing them to take 20% additional damage from your spells.

Using Torrential Wrath on an enemy affected by Stormcloud causes a Geyser to erupt beneath them, dealing 571 + 25% frost SP Frost damage and knocking them up slightly.

Generates 20 Static

talents.name: Kiss of the Clouds
talents.description:
Depletes 40 Static
Grant all party and raid members a shield that absorbs 101 + 100% Intellect damage, scaling with Intellect, for 10 seconds.

While active, the target suffers no spell pushback from taking damage.

rankDescriptions.description:
Depletes 40 Static

Additionally, you now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

rankDescriptions.description:

Casting Kiss of the Clouds now empowers your Air Elemental with Gift of Air for 30 seconds.

In addition, your critical strikes now extend the duration of your Tailwind by 1.5 sec.
Gift of AirIncreases damage dealt by 20%, spell haste by 15%, and heals for 13.75 every 2 sec.

talents.name: Flurry

Depletes 10 Static
Command your Air Elemental, causing its next instance of damage to unleash a flurry of air on your target, dealing 763 + 140% nature SP Nature damage over 21 seconds, and reducing their resistances by 75, and increasing their Magic damage taken by -2%.

rankDescriptions.description:
Depletes 10 Static
